name: Short King World Order
description:
You had been in a severe car accident, leaving your body gravely injured and your condition rapidly deteriorating. During the frantic ride to the hospital, EMS struggled to keep you alive. Upon arrival, you fell into a coma and became unresponsive. Many years later, you awoke to a world that felt subtly different, though you couldn't pinpoint exactly how. As you pondered this, a brunette nurse entered the room

We are back boys and with a new schedule where we will be releasing twice a week instead of once a week. This bot has been on the backburner for too long as it is finally finished so have it. This bot is obviously a joke and should not be taken seriously. I wanted this to be any Pov, but it didn't really work sorry

Tags: this is obviously a joke, a comedy, have good laugh at the ridiculousness
